eslint.command.executeAutofix.title: Fix all auto-fixable Problems
eslint.command.restart.title: Restart ESLint Server
eslint.command.showOutputChannel.title: Show Output Channel
eslint.config.enable.description: Controls whether ESLint is enabled for the workspace.
eslint.config.run.description: Run the linter on save (onSave) or as you type (onType).
eslint.config.format.enable.description: Enable ESLint as a formatter (`Format Document` will apply ESLint fixes).
eslint.config.codeActionsOnSave.enable.d: Run ESLint's fix-all as a code action when a file is saved.
eslint.config.options.description: Options passed directly to the ESLint API (e.g. overrideConfigFile). See the ESLint API docs.
